headline: Why The Story Around Federal Bank (NSEI:FEDERALBNK) Is Shifting On Subtle Valuation Tweaks
summary: Federal Bank's fair value estimate has been nudged to ₹294.78 from ₹294.66, a very small shift that signals only a fine tuning of the price target rather than a rethink of the story. This kind of marginal change lines up with recent analyst commentary, where models are being adjusted as sector inputs and peer comparisons are refreshed instead of rewritten. As you read on, you will see how these incremental moves fit into the broader narrative and what to watch as the story evolves. Analyst...
